t_ch: 倒也不用说得这么绝吧，谐乐学院的这群人真是死脑筋。
t_en: There's no need to be so black-and-white about it, is there? These Charmony Academy folks are so stubborn...

t_ch: 不过…乱破小姐，我也有件事想要商量——
t_en: Although... Miss Rappa, I have something I need to talk to you about, too...

t_ch: 最近财富学院有个外出交换的机会，正好分配到了我身上，因为是学院代表决定的，我也不好拒绝。
t_en: Recently, Fortune Academy has received a transfer opportunity, and I have been assigned the chance to go. The academy's representative made the decision for me, so I couldn't really say no...

t_ch: 和乐队的日程有冲突，所以就想问问…能不能允许我暂时离开，不参加后续的活动？
t_en: It clashes with the band schedule, so I want to ask... Would you allow me to leave on a temporary basis and not take part in any further activities?

t_ch: 当然，我没有任何退出乐队的打算，从前没有，以后也绝不会有。等处理完学院的事情，我肯定会回来继续排练。相信我，财富学院从来不骗人。
t_en: Of course, I don't plan on leaving the band, not now, not ever. Once I've taken care of the academy business, I will absolutely come back and continue practicing! Believe me, Fortune Academy would never lie.

t_ch: 你也要溜？
t_en: You're slipping out of this, too?

t_ch: 真的假的？
t_en: Are you serious?

t_ch: 我被你们骗过一次了！
t_en: Fooled me once, shame on me...

t_ch: 键盘•忍徒，音律•忍法的修行不可松懈，后续的狩猎还需要阁下……
t_en: Ninja Initiate Keyboard, the practice of Sound Release ninjutsu cannot slacken. We will need you for future hunts...

t_ch: 好啦，乱破小姐！相信我，我一定会回来的——
t_en: Okay, Miss Rappa! Believe me. I will definitely come back—

t_ch: 契波不顾乱破的劝说，匆忙离开了现场。
t_en: Czipo hurries out of the room, completely ignoring Rappa's attempts to persuade him.

t_ch: 阁下莫非也…？
t_en: Are you also...?

t_ch: 对不起！我一直都在骗你们。我根本不是筑梦学院选出来的乐队成员，而是在冒充顶替！
t_en: I'm sorry! I was lying to you this whole time. I am not a band member selected by Dreamweaver Academy. I was impersonating them this whole time!

t_ch: 此事…在下其实早已知晓。但阁下方才的演出没有任何问题，所以请继续与我等一同修行吧。
t_en: I was... actually aware of this the whole time, but you had no issues during our last performance. So, please, keep training with us.

t_ch: 不、不可以，我…我不得不退出了。真…对不起……
t_en: No, I cannot, I... I have to leave. I'm... I'm so sorry...

t_ch: 达凡绮默默离开了，临走前还抱着那把她最心爱的贝斯。
t_en: Dafanchy hugs her beloved bass tightly before leaving in silence.

t_ch: 主公，在下有些不知头脑，现在是何等情况？
t_en: Sound Master, I do not fully understand. What is going on right now?

t_ch: 喜闻乐见的情节。
t_en: What a dramatic and fun twist.

t_ch: 你的乐队炸团了！
t_en: Your band imploded!

t_ch: 鱼死网破，今晚就走。
t_en: We'll show 'em who's boss! I quit too!

t_ch: 莫、莫要慌张，容在下先去探探虚实！
t_en: Th—There's no need to panic. I will get to the bottom of this!

t_ch: 还有事吗？
t_en: You still got something to say?

t_ch: 音律•修行不可半途而废，请阁下随……
t_en: Sound training cannot be abandoned like this. Please, follow...

t_ch: 说什么修行，明明你才是最需要练习的那个吧！
t_en: What do you mean by training? You're the one that needs the most practice!

t_ch: 把音乐说成什么忍法，把乐器叫做忍具，一点对舞台的尊重都没有…这样的学生居然能当乐队核心。
t_en: Talking about music like it's some kind of ninjutsu and calling instruments "ningu"... you have no respect for the stage at all. I can't believe a student like this is able to become a band leader.

t_ch: 要是根本不喜欢音乐，只是为了好玩，只想要出名的话，最开始就别来组乐队啊。
t_en: If you don't like music and just want to play around and get famous, then you should never have joined a band in the first place!

t_ch: 我不欢迎，也不愿意和这种成员共同演奏。请回吧！
t_en: I do not want someone like you in my band, and I will never play alongside someone like you. Just get out of here!

t_ch: 其实她也不想这样…
t_en: That's not what she wants...

t_ch: 上次的演出…很开心。
t_en: You were... so happy at the last performance.

t_ch: 你一直都很讨厌我们吗？
t_en: Did you always hate us like this?

t_ch: 乐队核心，不应由这种不懂音乐的成员担任。
t_en: The band leader should not be undertaken by someone who doesn't know music.

t_ch: 以乱破同学为主导的乐队风格不符合学院规范，我也无法接受她如此胡闹的行事方式。因此，我不认为继续合作会有好的结果。
t_en: The style of Rappa's band is a form of music that is not aligned with the academy's regulations. I simply cannot accept her unruly behavior. So, I don't see any positive outcomes from continuing to work together.

t_ch: 好了，我说得很清楚。祝你们找到更合适的人选。
t_en: Alright, I have made myself very clear. I hope you find more suitable candidates.

t_ch: 在下明白了，但仍有一事相求。若阁下对音律•忍道抱有疑问，不妨继续随我等活动。
t_en: I understand, but I have one thing to ask of you. If you have any questions about the ninja way of sound, you might as well continue to work with us.

t_ch: 当然，去留皆由阁下决定，在下绝不阻拦。
t_en: Naturally, to stay or to go is your own decision, and I will not try to stop you.

t_ch: …看我的时间吧。再见。
t_en: ...I'll see if I get time. Goodbye.

t_ch: 这是最后通牒。今后不要再和我扯上关系。
t_en: This is my final ultimatum. Do not come near me again.

t_ch: ——键盘•忍徒！
t_en: ...Ninja Initiate Keyboard!

t_ch: 哟，这不是乱破小姐和乐队经理吗？来，我给你们介绍啊，那位是谐乐学院的风云人物，曾担任知更鸟小姐的和声歌手，我们在昨天的派对上刚认识。
t_en: Oh, if it isn't Miss Rappa and the band manager? Come, let me introduce someone to you. This person here is a Charmony Academy big-shot and former-backing-singer for Miss Robin. We met at the music party yesterday.

t_ch: 那位是筑梦学院的高材生，人称皮皮西战舞才子，我们约好了明天要乘飞车出游。
t_en: This person here is a Dreamweaver Academy top student. People say they're a master of the Pepeshi war dance. We've arranged to go on a flying car trip tomorrow.

t_ch: 还有那位更是重量级，财富学院的金融专家！还未毕业就已在苜蓿草家系崭露头角，倘若假以时……
t_en: Finally, this here is the heavyweight finance professional of Fortune Academy! They've already made a name for themselves among the Alfalfa Family, and they haven't even graduated yet. I'm sure, given time...

t_ch: 你不是要外出交换吗？
t_en: I thought you were going on an exchange?

t_ch: 噢，对对。我差点都忘了，就是…呃，我向学院申请，推迟了交换的时间。
t_en: Oh, yeah, that's right. I almost forgot. It's just... Uhh, I asked the school to push back my exchange dates.

t_ch: 就是…最近不是办音乐派对嘛，需要我亲自过问的事情有很多，抽不出空来专心做学术。没办法，能者多劳啊。
t_en: It's just... well, we've got the music party on at the moment, right? There are a lot of things that I need to take care of personally, and there's just no time to focus on academics. There's nothing I can do. The reward of hard work is more hard work, right?

t_ch: 你的朋友好多啊。
t_en: You sure have a lot of friends!

t_ch: 是吧！我契波在折纸大学可是出了名的人缘好，交际广泛，大家都愿意和我交往。
t_en: Right? I'm well known at Paperfold University for being popular and having lots of different contacts. Everyone wants to talk to me.

t_ch: 太受欢迎也未必是好事，就连原本定好的外出交换都被迫推迟了，哎。
t_en: But being popular isn't always a good thing. I even had to push back the dates for that exchange that was organized for me. Ah...

t_ch: 偷偷跟两位说，我和他们只是逢场作戏，不算数的。真要说起来，我的心思都在乐队上。
t_en: I'll let you both in on a secret. I'm really just playing along with these guys. They don't mean anything to me. If I'm honest, my heart is still with the band.

t_ch: 若真是如此，阁下为何要丢下诸音忍，执意离开？
t_en: If that were the case, why were you so intent on abandoning your fellow sound ninjas?
...Uhh.

t_ch: 哎，说实话吧，玩乐队这事，靠的就是热情。要是没兴趣，谁会愿意花几十个系统时躲在房间里练习，只为了台上那短短几分钟的演奏？
t_en: Ah, I'll be honest with you. Being in a band is all about passion, right? If you're not invested, why would you sit alone in your room wasting dozens of system hours practicing just for a few minutes on stage?

t_ch: 但…说白了，我现在有点腻了。彩梦校庆上那么多好玩的东西，为啥非得在排练室里耗着呢。演出嘛，随便搞搞就行！
t_en: But... honestly, I'm a little bored. We had so much fun at the Dreamlight school anniversary. Why should I waste all my time messing around in the rehearsal room? It's a performance, so just do what feels right in the moment!

t_ch: 此言差矣，诸位忍徒都很重视这场狩猎，阁下不应用此等态度……
t_en: You are mistaken. All ninja disciples are placing great importance on this hunt. This is not the correct attitude...

t_ch: 哎呀，乱破小姐，你们有你们的坚持，我也有我的喜好，大家的想法不同，就别硬凑合了。
t_en: Ah, Miss Rappa... You have your persistence, while I have my enjoyment. If everyone sees things in different ways, then there's no point in forcing us to stay together.

t_ch: 听着很有道理的样子…
t_en: That actually makes sense...

t_ch: 你不觉得玩乐队很开心吗？
t_en: Don't you enjoy being in a band?

t_ch: 还好吧。刚接触是挺有意思，练多了就觉得烦，热情总是难持久啊。
t_en: It's alright. It was interesting at first, but the more I practiced, the more annoying I found it. Passion is a hard thing to keep alive.

t_ch: …好吧，阁下的想法，在下已经清楚了——但要是音律•修行能变得更有趣，阁下会愿意回来么？
t_en: ...Fine, I see how you feel... But, if I could make sound training more fun, would you be willing to come back?

t_ch: 不好说，得看有多好玩。要不你讲讲？
t_en: I'm not sure. That would depend on how fun it would be. What did you have in mind?

t_ch: 譬如在下曾见过种极为特别的训练方式，使用纸盒•忍盔罩住头部，以达到全神贯注的效果。
t_en: Well, for example, I've seen a very special training method where you use a cardboard ninja helmet to cover your head to achieve maximum concentration.

t_ch: 要是观众都看不到我的脸，登台还有什么意义？不行不行。
t_en: But what is the point of being on stage if the audience can't see my face? That won't work for me.

t_ch: 再譬如…阁下精通键盘•忍具，可适当帮在下分担谱曲的职责，也算是能一展阁下的光彩。
t_en: What about... as you excel with the keyboard ningu, you can help me with some of the responsibility of song composition. You could use this as another way to show off your brilliance.

t_ch: 作曲啊，也太累了。那个谐乐学院的大小姐或许会有兴趣，但我不喜欢。
t_en: Composing sounds exhausting. Maybe that Charmony Academy belle would be into that, but I'm not.

t_ch: 譬如…譬如……
t_en: What about... what about...

t_ch: 就没活了？那我撤了啊。
t_en: Out of ideas? I'm out then.

t_ch: 好吧，那等此次作战结束，在下将会向诸位传授「缭乱•忍法」的核心奥义。
t_en: Alright. After this battle is over, I will teach you the true secrets behind my Dazzling Ninjutsu.

t_ch: 银河忍法，包罗万象。除登台所用的忍术外，还有诸多繁杂流派——通天遁地，画符结印，隔空传声，拉面速成，无所不能！
t_en: Cosmic Ninjutsu is all-inclusive. There are many schools of ninjutsu besides the ones we use on stage... They are masters of disguise, proficient with seals and talismans, capable of transmitting their voices over great distances, and great at instantly making ramen. There's nothing they can't do!

t_ch: 我真能当忍者？！不是玩乐队的，而是和怪物对战，拯救全世界的那种？
t_en: I can be a real ninja!? Not just playing around in a band, but actually fighting monsters and saving the world?

t_ch: 只要坚守忍道，任何人都有机会成为忍者。若阁下愿接受在下传承，或许能成为折纸村的上忍…乃至「折纸•忍侠」！
t_en: As long as you keep walking in the way of the ninja, anyone can become a true ninja. If you are willing to accept my creed, you could perhaps become an advanced ninja of Paperfold Town, or even... the "Paperfold Ninja Hero"!

t_ch: 忍侠…想想看也不是没可能，毕竟我的「炽热深蹲」在健身房可是无人能敌！
t_en: A Ninja Hero... It's not impossible if I think about it! After all, no one can keep up with my "fire squats" in the gym!

t_ch: 来忍界掌控雷电吧！
t_en: Come to the ninja world and master thunder and lightning!

t_ch: 你还真信啊？
t_en: You really believed that?

t_ch: 就问你，假设有台机甲摆在面前，只用唱两首歌就有机会驾驶，你愿不愿意试试？
t_en: Let me ask you. If there was a mech in front of you, and you only had to sing two songs for a chance to drive it, wouldn't you want to try?

t_ch: 必须请我吃橡木蛋糕卷才行。
t_en: You'd have to treat me to Oak Cake Rolls first.

t_ch: 不愿意，那台机甲我开不了。
t_en: No. I can't drive that mech.

t_ch: 行吧。匹诺康尼玩得差不多，也该去探索新的乐趣了。乱破小姐，别忘了你的承诺啊！
t_en: Alright. I think I've spent enough time in Penacony now. It's time to go in search of new excitement. Miss Rappa, don't forget your promise!

t_ch: 在下绝不会食言——
t_en: I will not go back on my word...

t_ch: 事实很清晰：学员选拔的负责人未能及时确认你的身份，致使这场闹剧发生。
t_en: The truth is clear to see: The student selection representative failed to confirm your identity in time and allowed this whole charade to play out.

t_ch: 但你明知错误存在，却选择遮瞒不报，占用学院名额参与乐队演出，实在难说是无辜。得出处理结果前，我会注销你的学员权限。
t_en: You evidently knew that there had been an error and chose to not report it, taking part in the music party and using up space in the academy's quota. It will be difficult to make a case for your innocence. Before we reach a final decision, your student privileges will be canceled.

t_ch: 明白。我会遵守的。
t_en: I understand. I will honor your decision.

t_ch: ——且慢！切勿妄下判断！这位…呃，金属•大师，可否听在下说几句？
t_en: ...Wait! Please don't be so hasty to make your judgment! Kind, uh... metal master, would you hear me out?

t_ch: 这位外校学生，你有什么想要陈述的？
t_en: What is it you want to say, external student?

t_ch: 在下作为「缭乱」忍首，有义务给诸音忍一个公正的评判。
t_en: As the Head Dazzling Ninja, it is my obligation to make sure every sound ninja receives a fair judgment.

t_ch: 贝斯•忍徒对待修行极为认真，从未有疏忽或是懈怠。即便性情内敛，不善言辞，亦始终以真挚善意待人，是我等「缭乱」必不可少的重要成员。
t_en: Ninja Initiate Bass has always been seriously committed to her training and has never shirked or neglected her duties. Though she is introverted and not gifted with words, she has always treated others with respect and kindness. She is an irreplaceable Dazzling Ninja.

t_ch: 故此，在下恳请你准许贝斯•忍徒即刻回归，继续音律•忍法的修行！
t_en: Therefore, I would ask that you permit Ninja Initiate Bass to immediately return to us and continue her training in Sound Release ninjutsu.

t_ch: 乱破同学…谢谢你。
t_en: Rappa... thank you.

t_ch: 重申：筑梦学院的选拔，仅以绩点为衡量标准。
t_en: Allow me to reiterate: The selection for Dreamweaver Academy students is based solely on performance and achievements.

t_ch: 达凡绮的学业成绩稳居倒数。此外，她的实习评价极差，入职数十次，从未通过试用期，遭到雇主的集体投诉，课堂作品悉数被筑梦师协会列为违规建筑。
t_en: Dafanchy's academic performance has been consistently poor. Furthermore, her internship appraisals are extremely bad, with her receiving constant complaints from employers and never passing a probation period despite entering dozens of internships. What's more, her works in the classroom are constantly classified as illegal constructions per Dreamweaver Association standards.

t_ch: 确实有点糟糕。
t_en: That is actually pretty bad...

t_ch: 智械也会学习不好吗？
t_en: Intellitrons can be bad at academics, too?

t_ch: 这跟音乐有什么关系？
t_en: What does that have to do with music?

t_ch: 我和原定的人选是相同款式的机体，就连出厂时间都完全一致，因此身份信息差不多。区别只有…她是第一名，我是倒数。
t_en: The originally selected candidate and I are the same model. Even our production times are the same, so our personal information is almost identical. The only difference is that... She is at the top of the class, and I am at the bottom.

t_ch: 负责的老师弄混后，我将错就错，来到了你们面前……
t_en: When the teacher got us mixed up, I went with the flow and appeared before you...

t_ch: …那原本的候选忍徒呢？
t_en: ...Then, what happened to the original ninja initiate?

t_ch: 我…我问过了。但她说比起演奏，更在乎现在的实习工作，就让我继续顶替了……
t_en: I... I spoke to her before. But she said that she was more interested in her current internship than performing, so she asked me to keep substituting for her.

t_ch: 既然如此，那由阁下上台又有何妨？
t_en: If that's the case, then what's wrong with letting you perform instead?

t_ch: 答案：此流程与选拔规范不符……
t_en: Answer: This process does not comply with selection specifications...

t_ch: 金属•大师，在下问的是贝斯•忍徒。
t_en: Metal Master, I was asking Ninja Initiate Bass.

t_ch: 在下只有一件事想要确认——阁下对音律•忍法是否仍心怀渴望，希望随在下继续修行？
t_en: There is only one thing that I wish to confirm... Do you still long for Sound Release ninjutsu? Do you still wish to train with me?

t_ch: 我喜欢音乐！也想要登台演奏！可…我……
t_en: I like music! I want to perform on stage! But... I...

t_ch: 金属•大师！依在下所见，阁下制定的选拔方式或有失偏颇。不仅无助于选出合适成员，更有损流派传承，长此以往，必沦为凡庸。
t_en: Metal Master! As I can see, there may be an undetected bias within your selection process. Not only does it not help in selecting the most suitable candidates, but it could also serve to damage traditional teachings. Should this be allowed to continue, it will lead to only mediocrity.

t_ch: 质疑：你做出这样的断言，论据是什么？
t_en: Question: What is your proof for making such an assertion?

t_ch: 论据？呵，这就由我等的主公来向阁下说明吧。
t_en: My proof? Hah, I will allow our Sound Master to explain that to you.

t_ch: 谁来？
t_en: Who?

t_ch: 我来？
t_en: Me?

t_ch: 说啥？
t_en: What did you say?

t_ch: 主公，阁下的「忍•般若智慧」远胜常人，早已想到如何驳斥金属•大师了吧？
t_en: Master, your Ninja Prajna Wisdom far surpasses that of ordinary folk. You must have already figured out how to remonstrate Metal Master, right?

t_ch: 股东{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我也想知道您有何见解？
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Shareholder, I would like to know your opinion on the matter.

t_ch: （既然临危受命，那就只能瞎编了！）
t_en: (I've been put on the spot. Guess I'll have to improvise!)

t_ch: 我来说明吧，我有一个理论——
t_en: Allow me to explain. I have a theory...

t_ch: 「垃圾桶理论」！
t_en: "The trashcan theory"!

t_ch: 垃圾桶在生活中随处可见，却很少有人真正清楚它的价值。
t_en: One can see trashcans everywhere throughout their lives, but very few people truly understand their value.

t_ch: 垃圾桶不是最聪明的，也不是成绩最好的，结构简单，外形朴素，但在我看来，它却是——
t_en: Trashcans may not be the most intelligent, and they may not get the best grades... Their structure may be simple and their appearance basic but, in my eyes, they are...

t_ch: 最美的。
t_en: The most beautiful.

t_ch: 最亲切的。
t_en: The most kind.

t_ch: 最有艺术性的。
t_en: The most artistic.

t_ch: 纯美的践行者能从小小的盆栽中看到美的理念，垃圾桶亦是如此。
t_en: A pathstrider of Beauty can see the beauty in even a simple potted plant, and the same goes for a trashcan.

t_ch: 这个理论足以证明——实用与价值并非相等。即便是达凡绮这样的电子小垃圾，也能在音乐这项伟大的艺术事业上获得成功！
t_en: This theory clearly shows that practicality and value are not equal. Even a mini electronic trash like Dafanchy can achieve great things in the grand and artistic career of music!

t_ch: 「回归性原理」！
t_en: "The theory of regression"!

t_ch: 只有回归，才能揭露秘密。
t_en: Only through regression can one's secrets be exposed.

t_ch: 所谓的回归，意指将万物向不变收敛。要是有极端过分突出，则需要对等的极端来抵消，两者地位相同，应得到同等对待。
t_en: This regression refers to the convergence of all things back to a constant. If there is an extreme on one end, there must be an extreme on the other to offset it. As they are of the same level of extremity, they should be treated as the same.

t_ch: 因此，倒数第一也是第一。证明完毕。
t_en: By this logic, the bottom of the class is also the top. There is your proof.

t_ch: 「忍•法则」！
t_en: "The Ninja Code"!

t_ch: 忍界浩瀚无边，无数忍村的规范与法令无穷无尽，忍者是否都要一一遵守？
t_en: The ninja world is vast and endless, with infinite standards and laws throughout countless ninja villages. Is it true that a ninja must honor every single one?

t_ch: ——否！忍者乃是忠于忍道之人，若外界的规范与秩序阻碍我等忍道，便应将其破除，贯彻我心！
t_en: Nay! Ninjas are loyal to their own way of the ninja. If the standards and order of the outside world serve to obstruct our way of the ninja, we will break them and implement our own beliefs!

t_ch: 因此，选拔规范与考试成绩无法限制忍者！只要行于忍道之中，忍者便如飞鸟般自由无缚！
t_en: Therefore, selection standards and examination grades cannot limit a ninja! Only by following their own way of the ninja can a ninja be free to fly like a bird!

t_ch: 总结：逻辑混乱，漏洞百出，胡言乱语，毫无说服力可言。
t_en: Conclusion: Your logic is contradictory, your argument full of holes, your speech mystifying and nonsensical, and there is no persuasive power to speak of.

t_ch: ——但我看到了你们对达凡绮的重视。我可以破例允许她继续参加乐队演出。
t_en: ...However, I can see how important Dafanchy is to you. I can make an exception and allow her to continue performing with the band.

t_ch: 果真？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 但是，有一个前提条件。
t_en: However, there is one condition.

t_ch: 阁下请直言，若是在下能做到的，当尽力满足。
t_en: Please, tell me. If it is within my power, I shall do everything I can.

t_ch: 音乐派对结束后，能否申请让校方接纳达凡绮作为正式的乐队成员？
t_en: Once the music party is concluded, will you be able to apply to the academy for Dafanchy to become an official member of the band?
...Huh?

t_ch: 原因：以她目前的表现，应该很难在梦中找到一份正式工作，筑梦学院对她的培养已经无能为力了。
t_en: Reason: With her current performance, it will be extremely challenging for her to find a proper job within the dream. Dreamweaver Academy has done all that it can in terms of her education.

t_ch: 说的好狠。
t_en: That's harsh.

t_ch: 有点伤人吧…
t_en: That's not very nice...

t_ch: 现在就业这么难？
t_en: Is the job market that tough at the moment?

t_ch: 分析：达凡绮对筑梦学院的课程并不感兴趣，也没有天份。在看过她的演出后，我认为舞台才是她应该去的地方。
t_en: Analysis: Dafanchy neither has any interest in the Dreamweaver Academy's curriculum, nor does she have any natural talent. Having seen her performance, it is my belief that the stage is where she belongs.

t_ch: 制定绩点优先的规则，是希望激励学员将心思放在学业上。但即使学员再不成器，作为学院代表，我也必须为她的未来负责。
t_en: The reason for formulating a grade priority system was to encourage students to focus on their studies. However, no matter how much of a failure the student is, I am still responsible for their future as a representative of the academy.

t_ch: 明白了——您是位真正的忍者•大师。
t_en: I understand. You are a true ninja master.

t_ch: 在下以「缭乱忍侠」之名承诺——音忍团体中，必定会有贝斯•忍徒的位置。
t_en: In the name of the Dazzling Ninja, I pledge — there will always be a place for Ninja Initiate Bass within my sound ninja group.

t_ch: 协议达成。你和同伴回去吧，学院内的反对意见，我来处理。
t_en: Then we have reached an accord. Please return with your companions. I shall deal with the opposition from the school.

t_ch: 呜呜呜…谢谢你们…我会努力的！
t_en: Waaa... Thank you all so much... I will work so hard!

t_ch: …在下算是深切体会到，忍首之位并非那么轻松了。
t_en: ...I have come to a deep realization that fulfilling the role of a head ninja is no simple task.

t_ch: 如今两位音忍已归队，只剩吉他•忍徒仍未成功劝服。经理阁下对此事可有信心？
t_en: Now, two of my sound ninja have returned to the band. Only Ninja Initiate Guitar has not been successfully convinced to return. August Manager, do you have faith in our ability to do this?

t_ch: 太有了。
t_en: Nothing but faith!

t_ch: 完全没有。
t_en: Not at all.

t_ch: 事到如今也只能相信了吧。
t_en: We have no choice but to believe at this point.

t_ch: 也罢，《银河忍法帖》有云——「时机未现，静候其变」。
t_en: Either way, the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions states: "If the time is not yet right, one must simply await change."

t_ch: 距离后续作战的时限已所剩不多，还是烦请主公继续为在下收集谱曲灵感。
t_en: We do not have much time before our next contest. Master, I must ask you to continue on your search for songwriting inspiration.

t_ch: 至于「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的困境，在下自会想办法解决。
t_en: As for the issues with {TEXTJOIN#120}, I shall find a solution.

t_ch: 诸位！战火未熄，音浪再起。让所有观众好好见识，我等「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的华丽忍法吧！
t_en: Fellow ninja! The flames of war still rage, and the waves of sound rise once more! Let's show this audience the brilliant ninjutsu of {TEXTJOIN#120}!
...Yeah!

t_ch: 主公！我等在此守候多时了！音律•修行进展极为顺利，就差最后的谱曲事宜了！
t_en: Sound Master! I have been waiting for some time! Our sound training has been extremely fruitful. All that is left to do is the composition!

t_ch: 在乱破忍首的带领下，大家的排练热情高涨，很快完成了预定进度。
t_en: With the guidance of Head Ninja Rappa, our passion for training was through the roof, and we stormed through our set schedule.

t_ch: 这其中也少不了我的支持！无论何时，我都是乱破小姐最真诚的拥护者。音符激奏！喔！
t_en: Let's not forget all my indispensable support! I will always be Miss Rappa's most faithful supporter. Note blast! Yeah!

t_ch: …别高兴得太早，直到演出结束都不能放松。
t_en: ...Let's not get ahead of ourselves. We cannot relax until the performance is finished.

t_ch: 看起来很顺利啊。
t_en: Looks like you're making good progress.

t_ch: 大家都回来了，我很欣慰。
t_en: Everyone's back. This is such a relief.

t_ch: 先说清楚，我只是暂时以乐队顾问的身份陪你们训练，并没有真正加入。
t_en: Let me make this clear. I am only practicing with you as a band consultant. I have not formally joined.

t_ch: 音乐派对是折纸大学的重要庆典，谐乐学院有全程监修的义务。
t_en: The music party is an important ceremony for Paperfold University. Charmony Academy has a duty to oversee the entire process.

t_ch: 感谢阁下不计前嫌，为诸音忍提供援助。按忍界礼仪，在下应为阁下绘制忍符以示谢意！
t_en: Thank you for casting aside previous grudges and agreeing to assist the sound ninja. In accordance with ninja customs, I shall limn a ninja talisman for you to express my gratitude!

t_ch: 真想报答的话，就去写首好曲子吧。
t_en: If you want to repay me, then go and write a good song.

t_ch: 嗯，那是自然。主公带回的记录正好提供了不少灵感。在下这就开始闭关——
t_en: But of course. The records that Master has brought me have given me much inspiration. I shall begin my seclusion...

t_ch: 音律•狩猎即将开始，请主公还是依循惯例，去察看诸音忍的准备情况吧。
t_en: The Sound Hunt is about to begin. Master, as is tradition, please go and check how the other sound ninja are getting on with preparation.

t_ch: 哼哼…哼哼…哼哼…哼…哼哼哼哼——
t_en: Hum hum... Hum hum... Hum hum hummm...

t_ch: （乱破沉浸在音乐的世界里，怎么呼喊都没反应了。）
t_en: (Rappa is submerged deep in the world of music. You cannot seem to get a reaction from her.)

t_ch: …经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，很抱歉，先前对你说了那种过分的话。
t_en: ...{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager, I am so sorry. I should not have said those things to you before.

t_ch: 先向乱破道歉吧。
t_en: Apologize to Rappa first.

t_ch: 哼，我之前说的并没有错。尽管…她也在以自己的方式追逐音乐。
t_en: Hmph, it's not that what I said was wrong. Although... she is also pursuing music in her own way.

t_ch: 你也是在为乐队着想。
t_en: You were thinking of the band, too.

t_ch: 不，我不是关心这只乐队，而纯粹是在发泄未能被选为核心的愤懑。
t_en: No, I was not thinking of the band. I was simply throwing a fit at not being selected as the band leader.

t_ch: 所以…我才不适合成为乐队核心吧。
t_en: So... that is why I'm unfit to be a band leader.

t_ch: 而我所认知的音乐概念又太过狭隘了，既忽略了听众的感受，更是将眼光局限在了学院内部，但却忘了…并非只有记录在乐谱上的才是音乐。
t_en: The concept of what I recognized as music was far too narrow-minded. I ignored the feelings of the listeners and limited my vision to the academy's internal beliefs. But, I forgot... that music is not just what is recorded in a score.

t_ch: 乱破同学的理念是正确的——旋律是大家对世界的记录，而合奏更是需要所有人齐心协力，绝不是单凭某个人就能凭空完成。
t_en: Rappa's philosophy is correct... A melody is a record of everyone's view of the world. A chord, moreover, requires people to be united as one. This is not something anyone achieves by their lonesome.

t_ch: …挺羡慕她的，没有接受过任何乐理教育，活在属于自己的天马行空的世界里，也因此始终保留着创造力，也有热情关照乐队的其他人……
t_en: ...I am quite envious of her. She has never taken any education on musical theory and lives in her own delusional world, but this has allowed her to maintain her creativity and given her the passion to take care of her bandmates...

t_ch: 而我不过是个被知识裹挟、被虚荣冲昏头脑、在象牙塔里闭门造车的学院派罢了。
t_en: Whereas, I am nothing more than an academic, blinded by my own knowledge, led astray by vanity, and left working away behind closed doors in my ivory tower.

t_ch: 我不是来问这个的！
t_en: That's not what I came to ask!

t_ch: 嗯？那经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}想知道的是什么？
t_en: Hm? What was it you wanted to know then, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager?

t_ch: 你到底为什么会回来啊？
t_en: Why did you come back?

t_ch: 乱破是怎么把你劝回来的?
t_en: How did Rappa convince you to come back?

t_ch: 啊…其实，后来乱破同学找过我很多次。
t_en: Ah... Actually, Rappa came to see me many times after all that.

t_ch: 课堂上、图书馆里、走廊的窗外，还有校长雕像头顶，她总是能从各种意想不到的位置出现，向我阐述她的音乐理念和方法论。我从没见过这么执着的人。
t_en: She was always popping up in the most unexpected places: In class, in the library, through the windows of the corridors, and even on top of the statue of the dean! She kept telling me about her musical philosophy and methodology. I've never met such a stubborn person.

t_ch: 对音乐如此认真…或许，我确实能从乱破同学身上学到什么，这么想着，就过来了。
t_en: She was so serious about music... Perhaps, there really was something I could learn from her. That's the thought that brought me back.

t_ch: …这也在乱破的计划之中吧。
t_en: ...I imagine that was her plan.

t_ch: 银河忍法，死缠烂打。
t_en: Cosmic Ninjutsu — Persistent Pestering.

t_ch: 无论如何，对音乐划分优劣原本就是错误的想法。我会继续参加乐队活动，请您放心。
t_en: Either way, I was wrong to categorize music as "good" or "bad." I will continue to take part in band events. Please rest assured.

t_ch: 金色音符激奏！绯红音符激奏！还有，看我契波大人的绝技——挑染缤纷音符激奏！
t_en: Golden note blast! Crimson note blast! Wait for it, here comes Lord Czipo's finishing move... Colored Highlights Note Blast!

t_ch: 别在训练室里玩颜料罐啊！
t_en: Don't mess around with paint cans in the rehearsal room!

t_ch: 跟自己的头发过不去了是吧？
t_en: Do you hate your hair that much?

t_ch: 能量绝非颜料，音符激奏绝非普通的键盘技法，而我，也绝非随处可见的财富学院学生。
t_en: Energy is not paint or dye, note blast is no normal keyboard technique, and I... am no normal Fortune Academy student!

t_ch: 哼，就问——你见过会忍术的皮皮西人吗？
t_en: Hmph, let me ask you... Have you ever seen a Pepeshi that can use ninjutsu before?

t_ch: 跟随乱破忍首修行的这段时间，我看到了以前从来没想象过的世界。
t_en: In my time training under Head Ninja Rappa, I have seen a world that I had never even imagined before.

t_ch: 原来…和同学说话不用这么小心翼翼，现在我也可以抬起头，大声向所有人宣布：我是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的重要成员，这里需要我！
t_en: I finally realized... I don't need to be so cautious when speaking with my classmates. From now on, I can raise my head and proudly announce: "I am an important member of {TEXTJOIN#120}, and I am needed here!"

t_ch: 学院的问题都处理好了吧？
t_en: The problems with the school are all sorted, right?

t_ch: 嗯，学院代表带我去和第一名聊了聊，接触后才发现，那些担心都是多余的。
t_en: Yeah. The academy's representative took me to speak with the top student. When we met, I realized that all of our concerns were for nothing.

t_ch: 那位学员…她的机体根本没安装音乐模块，是个绝对的音痴。怪不得她的成绩能这么好。
t_en: That student... She didn't even have a music module installed in her body. She's completely tone-deaf! No wonder her grades are so high.

t_ch: 开始新的生活吧！
t_en: It's time for your new life!

t_ch: 嗯！我决定了，要跟随乱破忍首潜心修行，成为合格的音律忍者！
t_en: Yeah! I've decided that I will follow Head Ninja Rappa and study hard to become a fully qualified sound ninja!

t_ch: 呼——诸位！新的音律•忍法已经创作完成。在下有信心，此次作战将成为《银河忍法帖》中至为浓墨重彩的传奇战役。
t_en: Phew — fellow ninja! My newest Sound Release ninjutsu is complete. I am confident that this contest will become the most vivid and legendary one in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions.

t_ch: 请拿出充分的气势，随在下奔赴音律•猎场！
t_en: Please work up your full momentum and follow me to our Sound Hunting Ground!

t_ch: 主公。我等出战的时机，仍旧交由你把握了。
t_en: Master, the decision of when to send us out to the contest remains in your hands.

t_ch: 冲冲冲！
t_en: Chaaaarge!

t_ch: 再等等吧…
t_en: Wait a moment...

t_ch: ——散而重聚，失而复得。悲歌无须慷慨，且看音忍来将对手尽数击败！
t_en: ...Separation and reunion, becoming lost and found again. Sad songs need not be overwhelming. Watch as the sound ninjas defeat all enemies!

t_ch: 经理阁下。何时该出战，仍旧交由你决定了。
t_en: August Manager, deciding when we go to the contest remains in your hands.

t_ch: 冲冲冲！
t_en: Chaaaarge!

t_ch: 再等等吧…
t_en: Wait a moment...

t_ch: ——散而重聚，失而复得。悲歌无须慷慨，且看音忍来将对手尽数击败！
t_en: ...Separation and reunion, becoming lost and found again. Sad songs need not be overwhelming. Watch as the sound ninjas defeat all enemies!

t_ch: …不妙啊。
t_en: ...Uh oh.

t_ch: 主公。想请问——你在校园里可有见到吉他•忍徒？
t_en: Master, I must ask... have you seen Ninja Initiate Guitar around the campus anywhere?

t_ch: 我没见到她。
t_en: I haven't.

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 艾尔菲同学说是要回谐乐学院，邀请各位老师和同学来观看演出…然后就再没出现了。
t_en: Arfey said that she was going back to Charmony Academy to invite her teachers and classmates to watch the performance... I haven't seen her since then.

t_ch: 喂喂，那个吉他手该不会真跑了吧？仔细想想，她好像确实没说要参加这次演出啊。
t_en: Hey, that guitarist hasn't run off for real, has she? Come to think of it, she never actually said that she was going to take part in this performance...

t_ch: 艾尔菲向我保证过。
t_en: Arfey assured me.

t_ch: 别忘了，当时也是她最先提出要退出乐队，这种摇摆不定的人怎么能相信！
t_en: Don't forget. It was her that first said she was going to leave the band. How are we supposed to trust such an indecisive person?

t_ch: 难道艾尔菲是在骗我？
t_en: You mean Arfey was lying to me?

t_ch: 先让我们以为演出可以正常进行，登台时候再玩消失。等观众彻底失去信心，乐队就真的要结束了！
t_en: First, she makes us think that the performance will go on as usual, then she disappears when it's time to go on stage... When our audience loses all faith in us, that is when a band truly comes to an end!

t_ch: 虽然谐乐学院的那群人脑子都不好使，但临阵脱逃未免也太不讲乐队道德了吧？
t_en: I know the Charmony Academy students aren't the brightest, but abandoning us just before the contest is a violation of morals, surely?

t_ch: 完了！演出开场前，吉他手跑路了。难道要去现场观众里随便抓个人顶上吗？
t_en: We're done for! I can't believe our guitarist has gone missing just before the show is about to begin... What are we supposed to do? Go out there and randomly pick a substitute from the audience?

t_ch: 我想，艾尔菲同学应该不是那种不守信用的人…吧？
t_en: I don't think Arfey would betray us like that... right?

t_ch: 不管她守不守信用，我们的信用是要掉没了！
t_en: Whether she would or not, our reputation is about to be destroyed!

t_ch: 距离作战开始的时限所剩无几，恐怕没有余裕来探访吉他•忍徒的去向了。
t_en: We have no time, as the battle is about to begin. I fear we don't have time to go in search of Ninja Initiate Guitar's whereabouts.

t_ch: 无所谓，我会出手。
t_en: We have no choice. I will stand in.

t_ch: 演奏用的那把吉他在艾尔菲同学身边，就算临时顶替…也没有乐器了。
t_en: Arfey has the guitar! Even if you were to stand in... you have no instrument.

t_ch: 没关系，我们会赢的。
t_en: It's fine. We will be victorious.

t_ch: 醒醒！这怎么可能赢，只有三个人还玩什么乐队啊！
t_en: Snap out of it! How can we win? How can we be a band with only three of us!?

t_ch: 唔…无妨！剩余的诸位音忍，先随在下登台——
t_en: Uhh... Fear not! My fellow sound ninja, follow me to the stage...

t_ch: <size=36>喔！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>YEAAAAH!!!</size>

t_ch: 咳。
t_en: Ahem.

t_ch: 咦咦，不对啊。记得上次乐队里有四个人来着，那个吉他手是退队了吗？
t_en: Huh? No, something's not right. Weren't there four of them before? Did the guitarist quit?

t_ch: 我就说嘛，玩乐队哪有不解散的啊，迟早的事情啦。
t_en: I told you! All bands break up eventually. It's always just a matter of time.

t_ch: 咳。诸位——我等乃是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」！
t_en: Ahem. Fellow ninja... We are {TEXTJOIN#120}!

t_ch: 世事•无常。由于突发状况，有位音忍没法参加此次作战了。然在下向各位承诺——
t_en: This world is unpredictable. Due to unforeseen circumstances, one of our sound ninja is not able to join us here. However, I vow to you...

t_ch: 即使战至最后一人，我等也绝不会撤离战场！
t_en: Even if we are reduced to our final man, we will never retreat!

t_ch: ——音律•狩猎，开始！
t_en: ...Let the Sound Hunt begin!

t_ch: ——开始！
t_en: ...Begin!

t_ch: 乱破带领乐队完成了演出。
t_en: Rappa leads her band to complete the performance.

t_ch: 演出的水平很高啊，旋律也不错…纯路人，感觉把键盘换成吉他会不会更好一点？
t_en: The performance was great, and the melody wasn't bad... I'm not a musician, but, maybe swapping the keyboard for a guitar might be better, though?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，四个小天才，搁这凑羁绊呢？少一个就玩不下去了？
t_en: Hahaha, is this just four little geniuses grinding friendship points together? One of you is missing, and you just can't play anymore?

t_ch: 要我说啊，这种莫名其妙的乐队就该早点解散，别在这瞎闹腾，最后坏了折纸大学的名声！
t_en: If you ask me, this kind of nonsense band should have broken up a long time ago. Quit wasting time messing around, or you'll only end up damaging the reputation of Paperfold University!

t_ch: 我是不是在哪见过你？
t_en: Have we met somewhere?

t_ch: ——这都看得出来？！
t_en: ...You could tell all that!?

t_ch: 哼，我不认识你！皮皮西人长得都差不多，你肯定是记错了！
t_en: Humph, I don't know you! Pepeshi all look alike. You must be thinking of someone else!

t_ch: 我推的「缭乱」从最开始就是三人团，望周知。
t_en: I'll have you know that the Dazzling Ninja I'm a fan of has always been a three-person band!

t_ch: 至于那个弹吉他的，只能说，最初的梦想，本就与你无关。
t_en: As for that guitarist... All I can say is that she was never part of the original dream.

t_ch: （成员缺场还是对演出造成了不少影响，得想想办法才行。）
t_en: (A missing member will have a considerable influence on the performance. I have to think of something...)

t_ch: 你沉浸在现场的喧闹气氛中，度过了一段轻松的时光。
t_en: You lose yourself in the bustling atmosphere of the crowd and enjoy a moment of relaxation.

t_ch: 问问发生了什么吧。
t_en: Best ask what happened.

t_ch: 莫、莫要慌张，容在下先去探探虚实！
t_en: Th—There's no need to panic. I will get to the bottom of this!

t_ch: 危！何等的大危机！修行尚未结束，诸位音忍却都心生退意，形势不妙！
t_en: Crisis! We have a major crisis! The training hasn't even finished yet, and all the sound ninja are talking about quitting! We are in dire straits!

t_ch: 万策尽了！
t_en: You've done everything you can!

t_ch: 要不我们也跑路吧？
t_en: Why don't we make a run for it, too?

t_ch: 唔…不可！音律•忍者师承同一流派，共同修行了这么久，在下早已将各位视作足以托付生死的同伴。突然说要离开，在下实在难以释怀。
t_en: Uhh... No! All sound ninja came from the same school of thought. Having trained with them for so long, I came to trust them as people I could entrust my life to. Suddenly saying that they want to leave... I just cannot get over it!

t_ch: 经理阁下——请随在下去劝服诸位音忍，重振「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的旗鼓！
t_en: August Manager... please come with me to convince the other sound ninja and fly high the flag of {TEXTJOIN#120} once more!

t_ch: 我要成为乱破小姐的门徒，成为忍者！
t_en: I want to become Miss Rappa's disciple! I want to become a ninja!

t_ch: 话说…我和乱破小姐创办的忍者团体，该叫什么名字？要不就叫「乱波」吧！
t_en: Now that you say it... What should we call this ninja band that we're forming? What about "Wave of Chaos"?

t_ch: 我这样…破坏了筑梦学院的规则，其余同学不会觉得不公平吗？
t_en: Do you think... that me breaking the rules of Dreamweaver Academy like this is unfair against the other students?

t_ch: 学院会给予那位学员相应的补偿，足以弥补未能参加此次演出的损失。
t_en: The academy will provide appropriate compensation to the other student to make up for not being able to join in with the performance.

t_ch: 而且每位学生都有属于自己的舞台——她也不例外。
t_en: Plus, every student has their own stage... She is no exception.

t_ch: 乱破同学不擅长乐理知识，这段编曲对她而言有些太复杂了。
t_en: Rappa is not great with musical theory, so this arrangement is a little complicated for her.

t_ch: 实际演出的时候，就由我来把控节奏好了…以防忘记，得先在乐谱上标出来。
t_en: When we actually perform, it's up to me to keep the rhythm... I'll make a note on the score, so I don't forget.

t_ch: （乐队成员都沉浸在音乐的世界里，还是不要再打扰了。）
t_en: (The band members are immersed in the world of music. Best not to interrupt.)

t_ch: 喔喔，没有键盘手的乐队是不完整的！
t_en: Ahh, a band without a keyboardist is incomplete!

t_ch: （乐队成员都沉浸在音乐的世界里，还是不要再打扰了。）
t_en: (The band members are immersed in the world of music. Best not to interrupt.)

t_ch: 所谓的青春和校园生活是什么呢…怎么想都不太明白。
t_en: What is this thing they call youth? What is campus life...? I just can't seem to understand them.

t_ch: （乐队成员都沉浸在音乐的世界里，还是不要再打扰了。）
t_en: (The band members are immersed in the world of music. Best not to interrupt.)

t_ch: 人呢？
t_en: Where are they?

t_ch: （虽然群里都说还没到……）
t_en: (The group chat says they're not here yet, but...)

t_ch: （但手机提示音明明就在排练室外面啊！）
t_en: (The phone sounds clearly show they're outside the rehearsal room!)

t_ch: （不知道乱破和乐队成员的关系怎么样了…有点紧张啊。）
t_en: (I wonder how Rappa and the other band members are getting along... I'm a little nervous.)

t_ch: （第二场演出的观众还是好多啊。）
t_en: (There are a lot of spectators here for the second performance, too.)

t_ch: （乐队成员的问题都解决了，这场演出应该不会出什么差错吧？）
t_en: (The problems with all the band members have been solved. There shouldn't be any more issues with this performance, surely?)

t_ch: 奇怪。到底去哪了？
t_en: Strange. Where have they gone?

t_ch: 大岚天在上，何等肃穆的氛围。缭乱•忍侠的眉头紧皱，她冰冷的忍力喷涌而出，凝结了四周的空气，你甚至感到了呼吸变得困难……
t_en: With the Great Lan above, the atmosphere is solemn and quiet. The Dazzling Ninja's brow furrows tightly, her icy ninja power surging forth, condensing the air in the vicinity — even your breathing is starting to feel difficult...

t_ch: 无论出于何种理由，言而有信，信守承诺，乃是忍者的立足之根。
t_en: Regardless of reason, keeping one's word and honoring promises are the cornerstones of a ninja's creed.

t_ch: 吉他•忍徒如此不辞而别，临时逃离战场——此等行径有违忍者的底线。
t_en: For Ninja Initiate Guitar to depart without a farewell, retreating from the contest so abruptly — such an act breaches the fundamental principles of ninjahood.

t_ch: 就是！害得台上的我们像傻子一样。乱破小姐，我契波大人申请即刻出发，缉拿叛忍！
t_en: Yeah, exactly! We looked like fools on stage. Miss Rappa, I, Lord Czipo, officially ask for permission to set off and personally apprehend this traitorous ninja!

t_ch: 会不会是…艾尔菲同学出什么事了？
t_en: You don't think... something happened to Arfey?

t_ch: 还是先回去吧。
t_en: Let's just head back first.

t_ch: 不管怎么样，乐队还得办。
t_en: The band must still perform, no matter what.

t_ch: 之后再拷打她。
t_en: We'll interrogate her later.

t_ch: 嗯，主公说得也在理，所幸本次作战还算顺利，未有更多变故发生。
t_en: Mm, the Sound Master makes perfect sense too. I take comfort that this contest went quite smoothly, without more sudden mishaps.

t_ch: 诸位音忍，请先随在下返回道场吧。
t_en: Fellow sound ninja, please follow me back to the venue first.

t_ch: 哟，小天才们回来了。欢迎！看各位的表情，演出反响应该挺好的吧？
t_en: Ooh, the little geniuses are back. Welcome! From your looks, I gather the show went quite well?

t_ch: 咦咦，我记得乐队不是有四个人吗，怎么少了一个？该不会是退出了吧？
t_en: Eh? Didn't you have four members in your band? One's gone missing? They left?

t_ch: 哎呀呀，要是音乐派对的演出最后弄砸了，乐队经理和核心可是难辞其咎啊？
t_en: Oh no no, if the music party performance ends up being ruined, I reckon the band manager and key members will have to be held responsible, no?

t_ch: 你不是刚才的那个观众吗！
t_en: Hey, aren't you that spectator just now!?

t_ch: 真能阴阳怪气。
t_en: You sure are passive-aggressive.

t_ch: 滚滚滚。
t_en: Get lost.

t_ch: 哎呀，作为学院代表，亲临现场视察校园活动的进展有什么问题吗？
t_en: Oh my, as the academy's representative, there's nothing wrong with taking a vested interest in how the campus event prep is going, is there?

t_ch: 阁下当然可以观摩我等的狩猎，但用卑劣的语句伤害在下的忍徒……
t_en: You are welcome to spectate our hunt, but using such hurtful words on my disciples...

t_ch: ——此等行径就如邪忍手下的那群面目可憎、品行低劣、到处惹事生非的「邪祟」一般。
t_en: Such behavior is akin to that bunch of despicable, boorish, trouble-making fiendlings working for that Evil Ninja.

t_ch: 不、不懂你在说什么。我们几个学院代表也不是来听你胡言乱语的！
t_en: I—I have no idea what you mean. We representatives of the academy aren't here to listen to your drivel!

t_ch: 听听你们在台上演奏的是什么，还是音乐吗？乱七八糟，稀里糊涂…不堪入耳！
t_en: Just listen to what you bunch are performing on stage. Is that even music? It's discordant and chaotic... A cacophony on the ears!

t_ch: 要是谐乐学院教出来的是这种玩意，我还不如去街边找几个自动乐团来当学生！
t_en: If Charmony Academy was responsible for teaching such garbage, I might as well admit an automated orchestra off the streets!

t_ch: 喂，破铁罐子，你也说几句，现在你不是这里水平最差的人了。
t_en: Hey, you heap of scrap, you say something too. I mean, you're not the trashiest one among us, after all.

t_ch: 拒绝：我与这位股东有协议在先，暂不发表看法。
t_en: Refusal: I have a prior agreement with this stakeholder, and will temporarily not be expounding any opinion.

t_ch: 啊？挺厉害嘛，这么快就投敌了，真不愧是理智的*智械*啊。大聪明！
t_en: Hah? You're pretty sly, defecting to the enemy so quickly. A true-blue rational Intellitron. Big-brained move!

t_ch: 对于此等蛮不讲理的恶徒，我等应当……
t_en: As for these unruly miscreants, we ought to...

t_ch: 用真言回击！
t_en: Retort with the truth!

t_ch: 我要DISS你们！
t_en: I'm gonna diss 'em!

t_ch: 乐队经理并非我本意，在场各位心知又肚明。起初让我当，现在开始慌。自己不愿管，如今想赖账。哪能什么便宜都给你们占！
t_en: Being the band manager was never my intention, and everyone here knows it. You insisted I take the role at first, and now you're starting to panic. You didn't want to manage things yourself, and now you want to back out. You can't have it all your way!

t_ch: 阁下说得甚好！在下也来助兴！
t_en: Well said! Allow me to join in the fun!

t_ch: ——「天之邪鬼在学院兴风作浪，缭乱忍侠将害虫统统清场！」
t_en: — "Malicious demons prowl the school in nests, and the Dazzling Ninja vanquishes all these pests!"

t_ch: 呃，还挺好听的？
t_en: Err, that actually sounded pretty good?

t_ch: 呜…艾尔菲，我最优秀的学生，我总算明白你是怎么变成那个模样的了。
t_en: Ooh... Arfey, my most prized pupil, I now finally know how you have fallen into such a state.

t_ch: 行了，我不想跟你们浪费时间。要说的事很简单——经学院代表投票决定，取消乱破及其乐队的登台资格，勒令解散，即刻生效！
t_en: Enough. I don't wish to waste any more time with you lot. The matter is simple — as per the voting decision by the academy's representatives, Rappa and her band are hereby disqualified from performing, and are ordered to disband, effective immediately!

t_ch: 折纸大学否认先前的演出能代表校方立场，更要制止你们继续肆意妄为。
t_en: Paperfold University refutes any previous performances as a representation of the academy, and will prevent you from committing any further reckless behavior.

t_ch: 至于音乐派对，学院会组织新的乐队完成闭幕演出。你们，哼，等着挨处分吧！
t_en: As for the music party, the academy will organize a new band to perform the closing show. Hmph, just wait till you lot get disciplined!

t_ch: 我可是盛会巨星！
t_en: But I am the festive superstar!

t_ch: 我可是匹诺康尼的股东！
t_en: But I am a stakeholder of Penacony!

t_ch: 别拦着，我就要进入战斗了！
t_en: Don't hold me back. I'm itching for a fight!

t_ch: 是啊，你当然不怕。但你的乐队成员呢，他们的前途可都掌握在学院手里啊。
t_en: Hah, of course you're not afraid. But your bandmates... their futures are in the hands of the academy.

t_ch: 这里是折纸大学！在学校，就得听老师的，有什么意见也给我憋着。
t_en: This is Paperfold University! In school, you're to listen to your teachers. Any and all objections must be stifled and swallowed.

t_ch: 听明白了吗？明白了就赶紧出去！这是乐队专用的排练室，闲杂人等不得入内！
t_en: Got that? Get out of my sight if you do! This is the band's rehearsal room. No unauthorized personnel allowed!

t_ch: 此刻，在下已经怒不可遏了——
t_en: I am unable to contain my swelling rage anymore...

t_ch: 真想将苦无狠狠扎进学院的牌匾，想要把那尊雕像表面全部绘满忍符！
t_en: I really want to jam my kunai into the school plaque, and draw talismans all over that statue!

t_ch: 我在精神上支持你。
t_en: I will support you. In spirit.

t_ch: 涂鸦时候记得写我的名字。
t_en: Don't forget to sign my name when you're doing graffiti.

t_ch: 完了！要被学校开除了！我还从来没见过代表这么严肃的样子，该怎么办啊！
t_en: Ahh! We're going to get expelled by the school! I've never seen the rep get so serious before. What do we do now!

t_ch: 听学院代表的意思，折纸大学似乎对我们的演出很不满，打算更换乐队。可是，从现场的反响来看…大家明明很喜欢才对啊？
t_en: What the academy's rep is insinuating is that Paperfold University is seemingly dissatisfied with our performance, and intends to change a band. But from the crowd's reaction... I think it's quite obvious everyone loved it?

t_ch: 学生喜欢有什么用，要学校满意才行！我们有决定权吗？说话管用吗？只能等着被处分！
t_en: Who cares if students like it? The school's preference comes first! Do we have any decision-making powers? Do people even listen to us? We can only wait to get disciplined!

t_ch: ——不可！在下实在无法认同如此蛮横的做法！
t_en: ...Never! I cannot abide by such uncouth methods!

t_ch: 在下使用的忍术、践行的忍道或许有缺陷，需要指正，然这并非能成为随意贬低我等努力的理由。
t_en: My ninjutsu and ninja tenets that I practice may be lacking and require guidance, but that does not give anyone the right to undermine the reason for my efforts.

t_ch: 真正的大师绝不会擅自将理念灌输给忍徒，更不应以自身标准来审视任何人。
t_en: A true master will never impose their teachings on their disciples, nor will they judge others according to their own standards.

t_ch: 忍者践行的「忍道」，只能由忍者自己决定。
t_en: The way of the ninja that we practice may only be decided by the ninja themselves.

t_ch: 诸位音忍！是否愿随在下——誓与校园的邪魔抗争，为此地受压迫的忍徒们取回公正！
t_en: Sound ninja, hear me! Will you be willing to join hands with me on a crusade to combat the evil that has befallen this school, to seize justice back from the oppressed ninja multitudes?

t_ch: 这…反正都是死路一条，不如临走前闹个大的。我契波大人就和财富学院拼了！
t_en: Err... It's game over for us either way, so I wouldn't mind going out with a bang. I, Lord Czipo, will duke it out with Fortune Academy!

t_ch: 乱破忍首答应过会接纳我，因此，我也愿意追随您，去往任何地方。
t_en: Head Ninja Rappa once promised to take me under her wing, and for that, I too am willing to follow you to wherever you wish to go.

t_ch: 带带我。
t_en: Take me along.

t_ch: 本人从未参与群内任何讨论。
t_en: I've never participated in this group's discussions before.

t_ch: 主公！吉他•忍徒始终未归，而敌方人数众多，在下迫切需要你的协助。
t_en: Sound Master! Ninja Initiate Guitar has not returned since, and the enemy number many. I am in dire need of your aid.

t_ch: 决定了——
t_en: It's decided...

t_ch: 「缭乱」要在最终作战的演台登场，将我等演奏的超绝•音律传递给所有观众！
t_en: The Dazzling Ninja will ascend the stage of the final show, to deliver the Ultimate Sound of our performance to the masses!

t_ch: 在下要让那群自称大师的乌合之众明白，我等的信念坚定，绝非旁人能轻易动摇——此乃音律•忍法的终极•狩猎！
t_en: I will have that rabble who proclaim themselves masters understand the tenacity of our will, that it will not easily waver before pretenders. This is the Ultimate Hunt for Sound Ninjutsu!
...Yeah!

t_ch: 猎物既定，来整理目前需完成的试炼吧。
t_en: We have determined our prey — let us review the trials that still need to be undertaken.

t_ch: 其一：烦请主公继续为在下收集谱曲用的灵感，以完成此次作战所需的音律•忍法。
t_en: First: Would Sound Master keep collecting inspiration for our compositions to complete the required Sound Ninjutsu?

t_ch: 收到收到。
t_en: Got it.

t_ch: 我已经是个音游高手了。
t_en: I'm already a rhythm game master.

t_ch: 其二：抵御心如邪祟的恶徒阻挠，为我等争取登台的时机。
t_en: Second: Resist the sinister machinations of those evildoers and secure a window of opportunity for us to take the stage.

t_ch: 就算学院要组织新的乐队，成员也只能从学生里面找。不是我吹牛啊，折纸大学里会演奏乐器的学生，我契波大人基本都认识。
t_en: Even if the academy is to form a new band, its members will be from within the school. I'm not one to brag, but I know pretty much everyone who plays an instrument in Paperfold University.

t_ch: 到时候，我去和新乐队的成员交涉试试，看能不能把演出的机会让出来。
t_en: When the time comes, I will try speaking to the new band members in an attempt to sway them into giving us stage time.

t_ch: 并且…负责舞台工作的蒙塔娜同学也是熟人，应该会帮我们。
t_en: And... I'm also familiar with the stagehand, Montana, who will probably help us.

t_ch: 其三：找回吉他•忍徒，聚齐「{TEXTJOIN#120}」。
t_en: Third: Find Ninja Initiate Guitar and regroup {TEXTJOIN#120}.

t_ch: 呃…要是那个吉他手想主动退出呢？总不能这种关键时候还要去找她谈心吧？
t_en: Err... What if that guitarist wants to leave? We're not going to try to have a heart-to-heart with her at such a crucial moment, are we?

t_ch: 我觉得…有点奇怪。艾尔菲同学在演出开场前突然失踪，而结束后立刻，学院代表们就在排练室了，感觉像是…故意等着看我们出糗。
t_en: I think... something's off. Arfey's sudden disappearance just before the show, and how the academy's reps were already in the rehearsal room right after the performance ended... It's almost as if... they were waiting for us to make a fool of ourselves.

t_ch: 如果决定离开乐队，艾尔菲同学就没必要浪费时间陪我们排练吧？
t_en: If she's decided to quit the band, why would Arfey have wasted her time practicing with us?

t_ch: 听你这么说，好像也有点道理。难道她是被关起来了？
t_en: It makes some sense when you put it like that. Could she be locked up somewhere?

t_ch: 哼哼。终于到在下大显身手的时候了——
t_en: Heh-heh. It's finally time for me to flaunt my expertise...

t_ch: 嗯…你们的幕后花絮完全撑得起一部新的影片了，我没能全程跟拍，还真是可惜。
t_en: Mm... there's enough of your behind-the-scenes footage to be edited into a whole new film. It's a real pity I wasn't able to follow you guys to film.

t_ch: 让我猜猜…你们的剧情临近高潮，但遇到了一些小小的阻碍？
t_en: Let me guess... Your plot is near approaching its climax, but you've suddenly run into a few speed bumps?

t_ch: 这套剧情结构都被拍烂了——如有需要，我不介意提供一点小小的推动，来帮你们摆脱这没有新意的剧本。
t_en: Such a plot structure is so yesterday's news. I wouldn't mind giving a little nudge if you need it and see if I can help you all breathe new life into this uninspiring script.

t_ch: 感谢虾蟇•忍者相助…我等的音忍流派有一位忍徒神隐，在下正在找寻她的踪迹。
t_en: Thank you, Ninja Gama, for your help... An initiate of our sound ninja school has gone missing. We're trying to find her whereabouts.

t_ch: 寻找失踪的演员啊…虽然不知道你们要找谁，但我发现校园里多出了一个奇怪的片场，或是说微缩梦境。
t_en: A missing cast member... I don't know who you're looking for, but I've noticed a strange set that popped up in the academy — or rather, a miniature dreamscape.

t_ch: 这枚忆泡记录了打开入口的方法——但这个梦境的具体构造未知，来源不明，搞不好是原始博士的人留下的东西。
t_en: The method to unlock the entrance is recorded in this memory bubble. However, the exact structure of this dreamscape is unknown, as is its origin. It could even have been left behind by one of Dr. Primitive's people.

t_ch: 那我们也要去！
t_en: Even so, we have to go!

t_ch: 为了「{TEXTJOIN#120}」！
t_en: For {TEXTJOIN#120}!

t_ch: 大不了变成猴子！
t_en: Worst case, we'll just be turned into monkeys!

t_ch: 呵呵，这次就让我当回观众吧，祝你们能够带来精彩的故事。
t_en: Heh-heh, let me be a spectator this time. I hope you all can weave an exciting tale.

t_ch: 完了！没人说过闭幕演出会来这么多观众啊，要是乱破小姐没能及时回来，台上只有我们两个人，不就成了纯小丑吗！
t_en: This is bad! No one said the closing show would have such a large crowd. If Miss Rappa doesn't return in time, we'd be the laughingstock with just the two of us on stage!

t_ch: 冷静点…现在最重要的任务是争取到上台机会。
t_en: Calm down... What's most important is to gain a chance to get on stage.

t_ch: 你们好…呃，没认错的话，你们是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」乐队的成员吧？
t_en: Hello... Err, if I'm not mistaken, you guys are from the {TEXTJOIN#120} band?

t_ch: 正是在下。
t_en: We are.

t_ch: 我们是校园名人了？
t_en: Ooh, have we attained celebrity status?

t_ch: 太好了！我是你们的粉丝，「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的单推！
t_en: Fantastic! We're {TEXTJOIN#120}'s most ardent fans!

t_ch: 其实，有件事情…你们听了不要生气啊，就是…前几天，财富学院的代表突然找到我，让我组织一只新的乐队，替代你们完成演出。
t_en: Actually, there's this thing... Please don't be angry after hearing this. Um... A couple of days ago, the Fortune Academy's rep suddenly hit us up to have me form a new band and replace you guys in the show.

t_ch: 他的态度很强硬，还用学分来威胁我，所以就…答应了。
t_en: He was really insistent, and even used my credit hours to threaten me. So I had no choice but to... agree.

t_ch: 但我们根本不想出场！不属于「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的舞台没有意义，并且，你们那么受欢迎，要是踢掉你们，我以后都没法在学校里露面了。
t_en: But we never really wanted to perform! A stage that doesn't belong to {TEXTJOIN#120} is meaningless. And you're all so popular — I wouldn't be able to show my face on campus if I were responsible for replacing you guys.

t_ch: 所以，我想把登台演出的机会让给你们！
t_en: And so, I want to let you all have the stage instead!

t_ch: …原来这么简单吗，跟我想的不太一样。
t_en: ...That was too easy. Totally the opposite of what I had in mind.

t_ch: 看来先前的两场演出，帮我们在学生里积累了相当高的人气啊。
t_en: Looks like our previous two shows really garnered plenty of support among the students for us.

t_ch: 你就是我们的救星！
t_en: You are our savior!

t_ch: 没有没有，「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的风格那么独特，乱破同学的舞台表现力也很强，正常乐队都不会想要和你们竞争的吧。哈哈。
t_en: You're too nice. {TEXTJOIN#120}'s style is really unique, and Miss Rappa has an excellent stage presence. Ordinary bands wouldn't dare think of trying to compete against you, haha.

t_ch: 算你识相。
t_en: At least you're being reasonable now.

t_ch: 毕竟「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的风格那么独特，乱破同学的舞台表现力也很强，正常乐队都不会想要和你们竞争的吧。哈哈。
t_en: I mean, {TEXTJOIN#120}'s style is super unique, and Miss Rappa's stage presence is mesmerizing. Ordinary bands wouldn't dare think of trying to compete against you, haha.

t_ch: 要不还是你们演吧。
t_en: Why not you guys perform instead?

t_ch: 不不不！比起在台上让大家失望，我们更想再看一次「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出！
t_en: Never! Instead of disappointing everyone, we would rather watch one more show by {TEXTJOIN#120}!

t_ch: 就这么说定了！学校应该会派人过来巡视，我可以帮你们望风，但要是真追究起来，这件事和我没关系啊！
t_en: It's settled then! The school should be sending someone over to observe the show. I'll keep a lookout for you guys, but if word gets out, this has nothing to do with me!

t_ch: 明白！兄弟，你真的太好了。真的。
t_en: Got it! You're the best, bro, really.

t_ch: 这话怎么听着怪怪的…我就先走啦，期待「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出！我们会来应援的！
t_en: That sounded kinda awkward... I'm heading off now. I look forward to {TEXTJOIN#120}'s show! We'll be in the crowd cheering you guys on!

t_ch: 虽然轻松得到了演出的机会，但是……
t_en: Well, that went really smoothly, but...

t_ch: 完了！时间要到了，乱破小姐却还没有回来，怎么办？总不能去台上表演相声吧？
t_en: Oh no! Time's up, and Miss Rappa isn't back yet. What do we do? We can't possibly do a crosstalk routine on stage, can we?

t_ch: ——音乐派对的闭幕演出即将开始，请表演乐队登台。
t_en: ...The music party's closing show is about to start. Performing band, to your positions please.

t_ch: ——重复。音乐派对的闭幕演出即将开始，请表演乐队登台。
t_en: ...I repeat, the music party's closing show is about to start. Performing band, please get on stage.

t_ch: 要不…试试？
t_en: How about... we give it a shot?

t_ch: 要上吗？
t_en: We going to do it?

t_ch: 我这是什么乌鸦嘴啊！不管了，还好仙舟商会的朋友给我看过不少切片。走，我们上！
t_en: I wasn't being serious! Never mind. Good thing that the friend from the Xianzhou Merchant Guild showed me plenty of video clips. C'mon, let's go!

t_ch: 就算只剩最后一人，忍者也绝不会逃离战场！
t_en: Even if we're down to the last man, a ninja will never withdraw from the battle!

t_ch: <size=36>喔！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>YEAAAAH!!!</size>

t_ch: …不是，这个乐队最近是在裁员么，怎么每次出场都会少一个人？
t_en: ...Hang on. Has this band been firing members recently? Why is it always missing a member when it goes on stage?

t_ch: 看来降本增效的风，还是吹到了匹诺康尼。
t_en: Looks like the cost reduction trend has blown its way to Penacony.

t_ch: 咳。诸位——我等乃是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」！
t_en: Ahem. Fellow ninja... We are {TEXTJOIN#120}!

t_ch: 喔。
t_en: Huh.

t_ch: 哎呀呀，今儿可真不巧，咱们乐队有两位成员呢，诶，都有事来不了。
t_en: Ahaha, how unfortunate! Two of our band members couldn't make it due to personal reasons.

t_ch: 不是来不了，是可能会迟到。
t_en: They're not absent. They're just going to be late.

t_ch: 对对，是会迟到。请各位等得莫心焦，且看我俩呢，来逗大家发发笑。
t_en: Yes yes, they'll be late. So don't fret, everyone. Wait till this dynamic duo turns those frowns upside down!

t_ch: 我叫契波，从来不懦。
t_en: I'm Czipo, and I never back down from any challenge.

t_ch: 我叫达凡绮，人称小垃圾。
t_en: I am Dafanchy. They call me Lil' Trash.

t_ch: 各位观众有所不知，咱们乐队啊，惯例有三不唱。达凡绮，你可知道是哪三样？
t_en: This may not be common knowledge, but our band has a policy of not singing three things. Dafanchy, do you know what those are?

t_ch: 这还不简单——第一场不唱，第二场不唱，第三场还是不唱。
t_en: That's easy: We don't sing in the first, second, or third acts.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，因为「缭乱」根本就没有主唱！
t_en: Hahaha, because the Dazzling Ninja has no lead vocalist!

t_ch: …我是来看乐队演出的吧，怎么开始说起相声了？
t_en: ...I came to watch a band perform. Why're they starting a crosstalk show?

t_ch: 这个段子尬的…能听半分钟不走都是神人了。
t_en: This gag was mad awkward... Those who didn't leave after thirty seconds of this are really too easily amused.

t_ch: （确实有点尬，但你们做得好啊，继续加油！）
t_en: (It really is mad awkward, but well done, you guys! Keep it up!)

t_ch: （那个学院代表应该很快就会过来，得想办法为乱破多拖延些时间。）
t_en: (That academy's rep will probably show up soon. We have to find a way to buy time for Rappa.)

t_ch: （那是…三月七和丹恒？）
t_en: (Is that... March 7th and Dan Heng?)

t_ch: 嗨！我们来看你的乐队演出了！听知更鸟小姐说，你现在是乐队经理？怎么样，组乐队是不是很好玩？
t_en: Yo-ho! We're here to watch your band perform! Miss Robin said you're a band manager now? How about it? Is it any fun forming a band?

t_ch: 听说音乐派对的闭幕演出是彩梦校庆最为隆重的节目，我们就从其他活动的地方赶过来了。
t_en: I heard that the music party's closing show is the most prestigious act of the Dreamlight Anniversary, so we hurried over from the other event venues.

t_ch: 话虽如此…呃，台上那两个学生是你们乐队的成员吧，为什么在说脱口秀啊？
t_en: That being said... Err, those two students are your band members, no? Why're they doing crosstalk?

t_ch: （将发生的事都告诉他们）
t_en: (Tell them all about what transpired)

t_ch: 啊…这么说的话，你们是偷偷上台的，随时会被赶走，乱破同学没回来，成员也不齐，没法开始正式演奏…还真是坎坷。
t_en: Ah... Which means, you're all on the stage without permission, and might be evicted anytime. Since Rappa's not back, your band isn't whole, and you can't start your actual performance... What a horrendous pickle.

t_ch: 等等。三月，你记不记得在访客认证的时候，有个皮皮西人反复询问过星穹列车的事？
t_en: Hang on, March. Do you remember that time during visitor verification, there was a Pepeshi who kept asking about the Astral Express?

t_ch: 记得啊。难道不是因为咱们现在是梦境里的大人物了嘛？
t_en: I do. Is it not because we're now famous in the dreamscapes?

t_ch: 刚才来舞台的路上，我还看到他带着好多人气势汹汹地朝这走，很恼火的样子呢。
t_en: On our way to this stage, I also saw that he was leading an angry bunch of people over here. They looked really mad.

t_ch: …糟糕了。
t_en: ...Uh-oh.

t_ch: 还是被发现了吗？
t_en: Did we still get found out in the end?

t_ch: 如果那个皮皮西人就是你说的学院代表的话，他们恐怕是打算阻止乐队演出。
t_en: If that Pepeshi is the academy's rep you speak of, they're probably on their way to stop this band performance.

t_ch: 啊？这怎么行！走走，我陪你去跟他们论论理，本姑娘最瞧不起这种恃强凌弱的人了！
t_en: Hah? That won't do! Come on, I'll go with you to talk some sense into them. I'm not going to stand by and watch them bully the defenseless!

t_ch: 嗯，当务之急是保证演出正常进行。我就留在舞台附近，防止对方使用强硬手段。
t_en: Yes, it's imperative that the performance is successful. I will stand guard near the stage to prevent the aggressor from getting violent.

t_ch: 怎么回事？我新找来的乐队呢？保安呢，那两个学生是怎么跑台上去的？
t_en: What's going on? Where's my newfound band? And how did security let these two students get on stage?

t_ch: 还有谐乐学院的那个老东西，关键时候就没影了是吧？
t_en: And where'd that old coot from Charmony Academy disappear to at such a crucial moment?

t_ch: ——安保部门全体跟我走，把那几个学生从舞台上轰下来！
t_en: ...The entire security team, follow me. We're getting those students off the stage with force!

t_ch: 哟，让我看看，挡在前面的人是谁啊，不就是那个违规演出的乐队的经理嘛？
t_en: Oh? And who's blocking our way? If it isn't the manager of the band that's performing without permission.

t_ch: 你的成员在学校里公然闹事，你是不是也参与了？
t_en: Are you also involved in your members making a public commotion in the school?

t_ch: 喂，作为学院代表，不想着好好教课，反而借着老师的身份欺负学生，你丢不丢人啊？
t_en: Hey, as the academy's rep, instead of intending to stick to your job and teach, you're abusing your seniority and bullying the students. Don't you find that shameful?

t_ch: 欺负？学生犯了错误，违反学校规定，当然要由老师来纠正。这叫尽职！
t_en: Bullying? When a student commits a mistake and flouts school regulations, it is naturally a teacher's duty to correct it. That is performing one's duty!

t_ch: 倒是你们乐队，在明令禁止的情况下擅自登台演出，对学校造成了极其恶劣的影响，要是真闹出什么事来，你承担得起这个责任吗？
t_en: I can't say the same for your band — barging onto the stage to perform despite being explicitly forbidden to do so, casting the school in a bad light. Are you going to bear this responsibility if something major happened?

t_ch: 没问题，我会负责。
t_en: Not a problem. I'll be responsible.

t_ch: 我什么都不会怕的。
t_en: I'm fearless.

t_ch: 哼，你是抱着多大的觉悟说出这种话。匹诺康尼正值经济复苏的关键时期，任何差错都可能酿成大祸，你背负得起整个梦境的未来吗？
t_en: Hmph, do you have any understanding of what you've just said? Penacony is currently undergoing a critical economic recovery, and any mistake could be disastrous. Can you afford to be responsible for the future of the entire Dreamscape?

t_ch: 赶紧让开！再扰乱校园秩序，那几个学生就不只是被处分了！
t_en: Get out of the way! Any more disruptions, and those students won't just be disciplined!

t_ch: ——各位，遇到麻烦了么？
t_en: Everyone, is there any trouble?

t_ch: 哇，是舒翁姐姐！好久没见了，你是来参加舞台表演的嘛？
t_en: Wow, it's Siobhan! Long time no see. Are you here to participate in the performance?

t_ch: 酒吧里要处理的事多着呢，我哪有这个闲工夫。不过是偷个空，随便凑凑热闹而已。
t_en: I have a lot to do back at the lounge, so I don't have much time for this. I'm just taking a break to enjoy the vibes here.

t_ch: 前两场演出，我都远程观看了，很精彩。没想到你还挺有当乐队经理的天分嘛。
t_en: I watched the previous two performances remotely and they were fantastic. I didn't expect you to have the talent for being a band manager.

t_ch: 要是以后有机会，来做我的专属经纪人怎么样？
t_en: If there's a chance in the future, why not become my exclusive manager?

t_ch: 求之不得。
t_en: That's all I've ever wanted.

t_ch: 我的要价可不低啊。
t_en: My price isn't cheap.

t_ch: 我已经是酒吧的专属调饮师了。
t_en: I'm already the lounge's exclusive drinksmith.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，这不是正好嘛，哪天要是酒吧开不下去了，咱们合伙办个怪物事务所也挺不错的。
t_en: Haha, isn't that just perfect? If there comes a day when the lounge closes its doors, we could partner up and run a monster agency.

t_ch: 你是…舒翁？鸢尾花家系的…那个躲在梦境酒店里和剧团玩过家家的人？
t_en: Are you... Siobhan? The one from the Iris Family... hiding in the hotel in the Dreamscape and playing house with the troupe?

t_ch: 没想到外面都传成了这样…随便吧。
t_en: I didn't expect that to be the version of the story you folks are spreading outside... whatever.

t_ch: 说回正题——我也算是受邀来参加音乐派对的嘉宾，很喜欢先前的演出，所以想问问，贵校决定替换表演乐队的理由是什么呢？
t_en: Back to the main point — I'm also a guest invited to the music party and I really enjoyed the previous performances. I'd like to ask why your school decided to replace the performing band.

t_ch: 乐队风格和本校所推崇的理念格格不入，并且与匹诺康尼的市场需求完全不符。不少原定来访问的贵宾，都因前两场演出过分怪异的气质而取消了行程。
t_en: The band's style does not align with the school's philosophy and is mismatched with Penacony's market needs. Many guests who were scheduled to visit canceled their trips due to the truly unconventional atmosphere of the first two shows.

t_ch: 音乐原本就是探索未知的过程，有不同的好恶很正常。但是将匹诺康尼的命运，压在几个学生的身上是否有些不妥？
t_en: Music is fundamentally about discovering the unknown, so it's natural to have diverse tastes. However, isn't it problematic to place the fate of Penacony on the shoulders of a few students?

t_ch: 换句话说…这样的想法，是否说明校方根本没尽到自身的责任呢？
t_en: In other words... Does this kind of thinking indicate that the school has not fulfilled its responsibilities?

t_ch: 责任的问题可以后面再讨论。但现在你也看到了，那只乐队根本没在演出，成员都凑不齐，要是放任他们继续丢人现眼，必然会成为折纸大学的丑闻！
t_en: We can discuss responsibility later. As you can see, that band isn't even performing! They don't have enough members, and if we allow them to continue making a fool of themselves, it'll turn into a scandal for Paperfold University!

t_ch: 音乐派对最重要的闭幕演出，台上的乐队却没法演奏，怎么都说不过去吧？
t_en: How is it possible that the band can't even perform at the most important closing show of the party?

t_ch: 明明是你把人给关起来了，现在反而怪罪我们，还讲不讲道理了啊！
t_en: You're the one who locked her up, and now you're blaming us. Can you start making some sense?

t_ch: 这位同学，你的老师难道没教过什么是举证责任吗？提出指控，就得有证据！
t_en: Dear student, did your teacher not teach you the burden of proof? To make an accusation, you need evidence!

t_ch: 唔…反正，乱破同学答应会赶回来，演出肯定能正常进行的！
t_en: Hmm... Anyways, Rappa promised to be back soon. The performance will definitely happen!

t_ch: 聪明人可不会相信承诺。要不这样，我从这里朝舞台走，如果这段时间里，乐队成员能聚齐，我就允许你们继续演出。够给面子了吧？
t_en: Smart people don't believe in promises. How about this: I'll walk from here towards the stage. If the band members can get together within this time, I'll allow you guys to continue performing. Is this enough respect?

t_ch: 否则，全员开除！敢和我打赌么，还是说——其实你也不相信她能及时赶到？
t_en: Otherwise, all members are expelled! Do you have the guts to make a bet with me? Or you don't believe she'll be able to make it back in time?

t_ch: 我相信乱破。
t_en: I believe in Rappa.

t_ch: 好，记住你的选择。我要开始走咯。
t_en: Okay, remember your decision. I'm going to start walking.

t_ch: 我…
还在迟疑？哼，不说话就当你是默认了。我要开始走咯。
t_en: Still hesitant? Hmph, I'll take your silence as a yes. I'm going to start walking.

t_ch: 我这还是第一次…庆幸对手是个皮皮西人。
t_en: This is my first time... feeling glad that my opponent is a Pepeshi.

t_ch: 要是他走路速度跟史瓦罗一样快，咱们就输定啦。不过没事，乱破同学会遵守承诺的！
t_en: If his walking speed was as fast as Svarog's, we would definitely lose. But it's okay. Rappa will keep her promise!

t_ch: 没想到吧，我曾经是校运动会皮皮西分会男子组轻量级的竞走亚军！
t_en: Bet you weren't expecting that I was once the academy sport day's Pepeshi Division runner-up for the men's lightweight racewalking!

t_ch: 就算校方允许演出，只靠台上的那两个学生也撑不了多久。
t_en: Even if the school allows the performance, it won't last long just with those two students on stage.

t_ch: 别紧张，赶场迟到是常有的情况。实在没办法，我也可以临时加入你们乐队。
t_en: Don't be nervous. It's not uncommon to be late for a show. As a last resort, I can join your band temporarily.

t_ch: 虽然好长时间没上过舞台了，但随便打打碟还是没什么问题。
t_en: Although it's been some time since I've stepped on stage, it's still not a problem for me to spin some records.

t_ch: 想不出办法了？只能到处求人帮忙了？尽管去找，我倒要看看你们还能玩出什么花样来！
t_en: Can't think of a solution? You can only go around begging for help? Go ahead and beg. Let me see what other tricks you have up your sleeve!

t_ch: 抱歉。这项决议由另外两个学院联合做出，我没有否定的权限。
t_en: Sorry, this decision is made jointly by two other schools. I don't have the authority to overrule it.

t_ch: 能确定的是，禁闭那个学生的梦境相当复杂，从其中脱身并不容易。建议：你们该寻找其他的解法。
t_en: What is certain is that the dreamscape confining that student is highly complex, and escaping it will prove challenging. Suggestion: You should look for other solutions.

t_ch: 急了？现在带着检讨书来找我认错，也不是不能原谅你们。
t_en: Panicking? I might forgive you all if you come forth with an essay on self-reflection and apologize.

t_ch: 明白。要是学院那群人打算动粗，我会拦住他们。
t_en: Understood. If those people from the school decide to choose violence, I will hold them off.

t_ch: 那个巡海游侠虽然言行举止比较怪异，但是个重信用的人。或许，事情还会有转机。
t_en: That Galaxy Ranger might have a strange character, but she's a person of honor. Perhaps there's a way out of this.

t_ch: 时间差不多咯…哈哈，等着上开除名单吧！你们乐队里的谁都逃不掉！
t_en: Your time is almost up... Haha, prepare to have your names on the expulsion list! No one in your band can escape!

t_ch: <size=28>喔。</size>
t_en: <size=28>Oh.</size>

t_ch: （怎么回事…现场突然开始欢呼起来了？）
t_en: (What's going on... Why is the crowd suddenly cheering?)

t_ch: 咳。
t_en: Ahem.

t_ch: 诸位——我等乃是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」！如华丽流星般撕裂夜空的音律忍者流派是也！
t_en: Everyone — We are the {TEXTJOIN#120}! A school of sound ninja that tears through the sky like magnificent shooting stars!

t_ch: <size=36>喔！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>YEAAAAH!!!</size>

t_ch: 世事如银河忍法般多变，许多意外在下始料未及，耽误了诸位时间。实在抱歉。
t_en: Life is as unpredictable as Cosmic Ninjutsu. Many unforeseen circumstances have caught me off guard, causing delays for everyone. I apologize.

t_ch: 既然是终极•狩猎，机会难得，就请「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的诸音忍介绍自己吧。
t_en: Since it's the Ultimate Hunt, this is a golden opportunity. Sound ninja of {TEXTJOIN#120}, please introduce yourselves.

t_ch: 大家好！我是「缭乱」的键盘手，名字叫做契波，也可以叫我——键盘•忍徒！
t_en: Hello everyone! I am the Dazzling Ninja's keyboardist. My name is Czipo, and you can also call me — Ninja Initiate Keyboard!

t_ch: 相信你们已经对我很熟悉了，哈哈…呃，音乐万岁！我爱舞台！也爱现场的所有人！
t_en: I believe everyone is already familiar with me. Haha... Um, music for the win! I love the stage and everyone here!

t_ch: 我…的名字是达凡绮…忍号贝斯•忍徒，来自筑梦学院，在「缭乱」担任…贝斯手！
t_en: My... name is Dafanchy... Also known as the Ninja Initiate Bass. I'm from Dreamweaver Academy, currently a bassist at... the Dazzling Ninja!

t_ch: 我也爱音乐！也爱舞台！当然，最喜欢的还是…和乱破忍首，还有乐队所有成员，共同演奏的时光！我们要一直、一直演奏下去！
t_en: I also love music and performing on stage! Of course, what I love most is... making music with Head Ninja Rappa and the rest of the band members! We are going to keep on playing!

t_ch: …说实话，我原本以为自己不会回到这个舞台了。这样的想法出现过两次。
t_en: ...Honestly, I actually thought I would never return to this stage. This thought popped into my head twice.

t_ch: 第一次是因为，我无法接受「缭乱」的理念。这并非是谐乐学院所能认可的音乐范畴，也与传统的乐理教育大相径庭。
t_en: The first time was because I could not accept the Dazzling Ninja's philosophy. This is not a category of music that Charmony Academy approves of, and it significantly deviates from traditional music theory.

t_ch: 第二次则是因为…敬爱的学院代表以谈话为由，将我拘禁在了刻意制造的梦境中，责令我独处思过，希望借此来阻止「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出。
t_en: The second time was because... our respected representative of the academy detained me in a deliberately constructed Dreamscape under the pretense of a conversation. He ordered me to reflect alone, hoping this would stop {TEXTJOIN#120}'s performance.

t_ch: <size=36>不要脸！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Shameless!</size>

t_ch: 但是，乱破同学两次都找到了我，将我从闭锁的世界中带了出来，所以——
t_en: However, Rappa found me both times and rescued me from that prison world, so...

t_ch: 我是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的吉他手，名叫艾尔菲——「吉他•忍徒」是也！
t_en: I am the guitarist of {TEXTJOIN#120}. My name is Arfey — also Ninja Initiate Guitar!

t_ch: 我们在这里演奏，要让那些闭目塞听的人，那些高高在上的人，听到我们的声音！！！
t_en: Our performance here is for those who refuse to see or hear, and for those who are on their high horses — to hear our voices!
